title: Notifications - Device disconnected
scenario: Tapping "Device is disconnected" notification redirects to Poly Lens Home Screen showing the disconnected device when paired device is turned off while app is in background
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
2. Press the Home button to send the app to the background.
3. Turn off the paired Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power off).
4. Observe the notification that appears on the device.
expected: A "Device is disconnected" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen showing the disconnected device.
